action_set_definitions.name: get_fleet_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current system time and a list of active vehicles with their route progress, current delay, and trip IDs.

action_set_definitions.name: get_trip_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Provides detailed real-time metrics for a specific trip, including passenger load factor and exact headway distance/time to the following vehicle.

trip_id.description: The unique ID of the trip.

action_set_definitions.name: get_station_status
action_set_definitions.description: Returns current conditions at a specific stop, including Level of Service (LOS), platform occupancy, and safety-specific flags (e.g., skip_allowed).

stop_index.description: The index of the stop in the route sequence.

action_set_definitions.name: set_operational_directives
action_set_definitions.description: Configures transit signal priority (TSP) and stop-by-stop boarding policies for a vehicle.

action_set_definitions.name: regulate_vehicle_flow
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the speed or dwell behavior of a vehicle to manage headway gaps.

speed_multiplier.description: Factor to adjust cruising speed (e.g., 1.1 for 10% faster).

hold_duration_mins.description: Duration to hold at the current stop.

action_set_definitions.name: simulate_to_terminal
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation until the specified trip reaches its terminal stop, reporting final delay, load, and headway compliance.

terminal_index.description: The stop index of the terminal.

state_description.system_time: Current simulation time in minutes from the start of the service day (e.g., 480 for 08:00 AM).
state_description.active_vehicles: List of vehicles currently in operation, including their ID, current route_id, last_stop_index, and current_delay (in minutes).
state_description.schedule_deviations: A map of trip_ids to their current cumulative delay or status (e.g., 'on_time', 'delayed', 'cancelled').
state_description.resource_pool: Status of spare resources, such as 'available_spare_buses' and 'available_standby_drivers'.
state_description.network_incidents: List of active disruptions affecting specific segments of the transit network (e.g., road closures or signal failures).

network_incidents.description: High-Accessibility Zone: Multiple mobility device boardings confirmed; boarding restrictions prohibited.
